rulings.Case Title: ALEXANDER VILDERMAN VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 12, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. and RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is overruled as to first and fourth causes of action - SAC sufficiently alleges misrepresentation in regards to 12-month loan reinstatement offered on March 23, 2012 (SAC 6:5-10); falsity of availability of such reinstatement (SAC 6:20; 6:28); intent, reliance and damages (SAC 6: 10; and paragraph 26). Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to (1) second and sixth causes of action for negligent misrepresentation and negligence to allege legal duty; and (2) third cause of action for wrongful foreclosure to allege unconditional tender and facts showing that amount requested in NOD and NOTS were "improperly inflated." = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: JAMIE LEE VS. CYNTHIA RESMA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause To Hear Motion For Tro To Vacate Foreclosure Sale Date
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 12, 2013, line 11. Order To Show Cause To Hear Motion For TRO/To Vacate Foreclosure Sale Date Hearing Required to address (1) whether payments towards remodeling were in lieu of cash payment on the Note; (2) whether Deed of Trust was listed in Defendant's Bankruptcy case; and (3) if it was not, whether Defendants are precluded from foreclosing on the Deed of Trust. Parties' unauthorized filings of "Amend" opposition and "amended" reply are stricken. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC VS. LETICIA GONZALES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Deft'S Responses To Deposition Questions; Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 12, 2013, line 7. PLAINTIFF 1320-1380 LOMBARD STREET, LLC's Motion To Compel Defendant's Responses To Deposition Questions; Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Defendant shall provide information regarding her leases and residencies concurrent with her tenancy at the Premises; and respond to questions regarding prayer for relief and attorney's fees. Motion is DENIED as to offering any other units for rent, including unit #602, as irrelevant to the sole issue of possession of unit #603. = (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN TABER VS. JEREMY GIBNEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 12, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT JEREMY GIBNEY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Taking all allegations in the Complaint as true, First Amended Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/LOT)
